2165990.name: Fantasy Grounds - Pathfinder RPG - Pathfinder Flip-Mat - Bigger Forest
2165990.description:
NOTE: This product does not qualify for a PDF discount from Paizo.

Pathfinder RPG - Pathfinder Flip-Mat - Bigger Forest

Lonely, Dark, and Deep
Whether sneaking through the undergrowth to preempt a bandit ambush or hunting elusive forest creatures, the possibilities for adventure are endless with Pathfinder Flip-Mat: Bigger Forest. With an area that's 45% larger than 
Pathfinder Flip-Mat: Deep Forest  at their disposal, Game Masters can now dream even bigger! This massive gaming accessory presents both a thriving forest and a blighted, dead stretch of former woodlands, which can be home to everything from monsters to outlaw archers to ancient druids.
Don't waste your time drawing every stump and knot of shrubs. With Pathfinder Flip-Mat: Bigger Forest, you'll be ready the next time your players head into the woods!
 NOTE: This product has been made specifically for the Pathfinder ruleset, but can be used for 5E, Starfinder, or any ruleset supported by Fantasy Grounds
This product is not a PDF or accessible outside of Fantasy Grounds. It has been lovingly converted for use within Fantasy Grounds and Features the Following additions:
  • All maps resized and set up with a preset grid to make combats easy to manage
  • All the images and handouts from the book available to share with your players as you need them
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Wayne Arsenault
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and any ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
